reference: Before three to four years ago, my hair was thick and could be easily styled, but now it does not set easily. My treatment is ongoing, but I want my old hair back because everyone liked my hair at that time. So what should I do? I am experiencing hair fall, and I have a protein deficiency and an infection problem.
